description: Landing page copy. Used for campaign pages, pre-launch waitlists, equity crowdfunding, product launches. Evaluates the text content layer, not design/layout.

headline.description: H1 hero headline. The single most important line on the page.

subhead.description: Supporting text below the headline. Clarifies the offer.

hero_copy.description: Above-the-fold body copy. Sets context before the fold.

sections.description: Page sections below the fold. Each section has a heading, body, and optional proof elements.

proof.description: Stats, testimonials, or evidence items in this section.

cta.description: Primary page CTA. Text + action (e.g., 'Join the Waitlist → email capture form').
